hooks.command: sh -c 'd="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != / ] && [ ! -f "$d/.agents/adapters/shared/journal-hook.js" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; [ -f "$d/.agents/adapters/shared/journal-hook.js" ] || exit 0; exec node "$d/.agents/adapters/shared/journal-hook.js" --harness codex'
